Plaintiff Bing Huang Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Demand For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jul-30-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Atty. SUSAN F. REYES, Esq. of Law Offices of Susan F. Reyes (Tel: 415-982-0241) for Plaintiff Bing Huang;
Atty. MATTHEW MIHALY, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP (Tel: 415.362.2580) for Defendants and Cross-Defendants Rosa Parks Ii, L.P. and RP Associates, L.P., Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation and Defendant Matthew Martin.

Hearing Re: Plaintiff Bing Huang's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Demand For Production Of Documents.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear.

Parties stipulate to the matter being decided by the judge pro tem. The judge pro tem and parties all appearing remotely authorize the clerk to sign the stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Plaintiff's counsel is instructed to submit a proposed order to the judge pro tem by email as soon as possible. The proposed order is to be in Word format and is to track which requests were granted by the Court and which were denied as discussed at today's hearing and is to leave the amounts for awards of sanctions blank.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
